title: ELEMENTAL

photo.imgAlt: Image from Music Gallery Desiderium performance

desc: Our debut concert, ELEMENTAL, for The Music Gallery's You In Mind series. The first half of the program features works by Matthew Shlomowitz, Pauline Oliveros, Julia Mermelstein, and Nolan Hildebrand. The second half featured our epic multimedia tribute to the four elements of nature, the Elemental Suite.

title: Behaviours: Play

program.title: 0 Damage Any % Reverse Glitch Speed Run

photo.imgAlt: Image from ArrayMusic Speed Run performance

desc: In February of 2024, we performed a program designed around the idea of play for ArrayMusic's Behaviours series. In this program we debuted our performance of Jet Kye Chong's Anticommunication, as well as two new compositions, Feedback Dreams and 0% Any Damage Reverse Glitch Speed Run.

title: Horse Idoling Zone
desc: We'll be playing a set at the next PonyHAUS show, Horse Idoling Zone! This show is a triple bill with G.A.G. and Daniel Tapper.
shortDesc: JOIN US AS WE SACRIFICE BODY AND SOUL TO THE EQUESTRIAN OVERLORDS. We'll be sharing the bill with G.A.G. along with visuals from Dan Tapper, in a space dedicated to the praise of ponies.

title: Canvas Conductor at Vector Fest
desc: Canvas Conductor is an interdisciplinary instrument by musical and performance duo, Duo Cichorium, built and debuted in May 2024. It is a hybrid artistic tool that integrates a painter’s canvas with a custom built synthesizer and a suite of other digital musical technologies, giving four painters simultaneous control over sonic and visual output. The most recent version of this developing instrument utilizes reusable Chinese calligraphy paper instead of standard cotton canvases. Rather than using acrylic or watercolor paints, the artist uses plain water to paint on the surface. As the water evaporates, the surface becomes blank again, allowing the instrument to be used over and over. The nervous system of the instrument consists of galvanized steel wires woven through the painting surface, receiving input from the painters through electrically charged paint brushes. The action of painting over the wires with the paintbrush continually opens and closes electrical circuits, acting as “buttons” for painters to push with their brushes. The canvas is also outfitted with contact microphones, amplifying the tactile gestures and brush strokes of the painters.
shortDesc: Performance and installation with the newest version of Canvas Conductor

title: King Tilly's Shoe Disaster

photos.title: The gang
photos.imgAlt: Duo Cichorium in front of a screen

desc: Hear ye, hear ye! Step into a world of music, magic, and marvelous shoes! This delightful performance combines interactive storytelling, hands-on fun, and lively audience participation — perfect for kids, families, and anyone who loves a royal adventure. Meet King Tilly, the royal kitty with the world’s most fabulous shoe collection. Inspired by his dear friend Mrs. Sonja Bata, King Tilly has made it his royal mission to collect shoes from every corner of the globe. From dazzling Renaissance chopines to rugged Mongolian gutal boots to delicate ballet slippers, each journey adds a new treasure to his ever-growing Shoe Pile — a dangerously tall tower of footwear stacked right beside the Grand Window. But beware… one mighty gust of winter wind could send this wobbly pile tumbling into chaos! If disaster strikes, will you be ready to help King Tilly sort through his marvelous collection and restore order to the royal closet?
shortDesc: A special family friendly spin-off of Sylvan Legacy, KING TILLY'S SHOE DISASTER. Help us clean up this mess!

title: Open Ears Interactive Performance Workshop
desc: Our first workshop at Open Ears 2026 was a session to show two of our interactive works, Speed Run and Canvas Conductor
shortDesc: A workshop for Open Ears demonstrating two of our interactive works, Speed Run and Canvas Conductor

title: Open Ears DIY Instrument Building Workshop
desc: Our second workshop at Open Ears 2026 was a session led by Jaz showing off lots of ways to use dollar store and household objects to build instruments.
shortDesc: A workshop for Open Ears demonstrating ideas on building DIY instruments.

title: Open Ears Improvisation Workshop
desc: Our last workshop at Open Ears 2026 was a group improvisation workshop led by Jaz, focusing on listening strategies, and the interpretation of ext and graphic scores.
shortDesc: A workshop for Open Ears focused on improvisation.

title: The Sylvan Legacy at Open Ears
desc: Closing up our stay at Open Ears was a performance of The Sylvan Legacy, our choose-your-own-adventure journey through the Sylvan Forest!
shortDesc: Closing up our stay at Open Ears was a performance of The Sylvan Legacy, our choose-your-own-adventure journey through the Sylvan Forest!
